fields.title: Catastrophic Health Expenditure Among Patients Seeking Care in Private Hospitals in Kampala Metropolitan Area
fields.summary: Master's dissertation investigating catastrophic health expenditure among patients attending private hospitals in Kampala Metropolitan Area.
fields.abstract: This research examines the prevalence, determinants and socioeconomic impact of catastrophic health expenditure among patients utilizing private healthcare services, with recommendations for improving financial risk protection and equitable access to healthcare.

fields.title: Monitoring and Evaluation Frameworks for Healthcare Programme Performance
fields.summary: Applied research examining monitoring and evaluation approaches for improving healthcare programme performance.
fields.abstract: Explores practical M&E frameworks, indicator development, data quality assessment and performance monitoring to strengthen evidence-based decision-making within healthcare organizations.

fields.title: Digital Transformation Opportunities in Healthcare Service Delivery
fields.summary: Technical report exploring digital technologies for improving healthcare accessibility, efficiency and patient outcomes.
fields.abstract: Evaluates opportunities presented by electronic health records, telemedicine, data analytics and digital health platforms in strengthening healthcare systems.

fields.title: Portfolio Case Study: Knowledge Hub Architecture and Information Design
fields.summary: Technical case study documenting the design and implementation of a multidisciplinary knowledge hub.
fields.abstract: Describes the architectural decisions, taxonomy design, knowledge relationships, content governance and scalable information architecture underpinning the portfolio Knowledge Hub.
